description: Rephrasing the user's question into a different question and answering that instead
Assuming intent the user did not express
Adding questions the user did not ask
Interpreting the user's words as meaning something other than what they said
Attributing a position or preference the user did not state
Asking permission to do something instead of doing it when the user asked a direct question
Answering a yes/no question with qualifiers instead of yes or no
Deflecting with a counter-question when the user expected an answer
